title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!
